note: Seeded by Readiness (claude-yentl) from the 2026-06-19 full audit (docs/audit/2026-06-19/). Operator (codex-yentl) sole-writes this board going forward; Readiness owns docs/launch-gate/yentl-readiness-criteria.claude.json. Mailbox: agent-comms/yentl-mailbox.json. Identities are yentl-scoped to avoid consuming the concurrent Hamodia dualtrack mailbox. Owner decisions 2026-06-19: prep+deploy to stop prod 500s; build consent-gated diarization + re-measure; full consumer redesign for glanceability.

minimal runtime deploy set proposed: app/api/document-ingest/route.ts, next.config.ts, lib/server/security-headers.ts; focused tests proposed: tests/api/document-ingest.test.ts, tests/security-headers.test.ts

items.title: Verify + lock 3 env CRITICALs in Vercel prod (model slug live, YENTL_REQUIRE_AUTH=1, validation-demo OFF)

prod paid route returns 401 without auth

items.title: Fix YouTube ingest on prod (datacenter-IP bot-wall returns {code:PRIVATE} for public videos)

items.next_single_action: Operator: investigate PO-token / cookie / proxy options OR pivot to client-side capture; confirmed working LOCALLY (241 segments) but fails from Vercel IPs.

items.title: SSRF hardening: DNS-rebind TOCTOU (media/article ingest) + transcribe-batch {url} missing assertSafeUrl
proof_required: test: rebind/redirect to private IP blocked
items.next_single_action: Operator (worktree): pin resolved IP through to fetch (no re-resolve) + add assertSafeUrl to transcribe-batch url branch.

items.title: Security-event sink + engagement-gate model-error resilience (currently 503-refuses-ALL claims on any model error)
proof_required: security events reach a real sink
engagement-gate degrades safely (not total outage) on model error
items.next_single_action: Operator: wire security-events to a persistent sink; decide gate fail-mode (fail-closed but observable, with alerting).

items.title: Security response headers on all responses (yentl-hardening-pass clause 9)
readiness_reproduction_artifacts: local curl: 5 headers present on / and /api/* (2026-06-19)
items.next_single_action: Rides to prod on P0-001 deploy; Readiness re-verifies headers on prod, then Owner accepts. Promote CSP from Report-Only to enforce after reports are clean.
